Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Leah]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Leah is the daughter of Kelia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Leah is a girl in Myria who moved from Bel Calem two years prior.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Leah wears a silver bracelet with a clear white crystal dangling from the chain.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Leah has blue eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Leah is a character with bright blue eyes who carries a bloodstained sword and a crystal bracelet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Leah is referred to as Highness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Leah has the ability to take a life with a stray thought.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Leah was a captive in chains and a collar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 4''' — Leah is present in the cave.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 5''' — Leah was taken by enemy soldiers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 6''' — Leah is a person Simon remembers wearing a steel collar and a shapeless brown sack.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 7''' — Leah is someone Simon wishes to save.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 8''' — Leah is someone Alin thinks about.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 9''' — Simon wants to free Leah with the power of a Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Nurita is Leah's aunt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Leah is a person scheduled to be sacrificed to Zakareth’s Territory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Leah is a captive held by Malachi.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Leah is the sister of Nurita's niece.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Leah was taken by the Overlord to the Overlord's house.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 19''' — Simon is searching for Leah.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 20''' — Leah is a girl who may be at the house.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 21''' — Leah is a spy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 21''' — Leah is a character who fakes shock and tears to manipulate men.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 21''' — Leah sounds uncomfortably like her aunt when she takes the lead.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 22''' — Leah is traveling with Simon and Alin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 22''' — Simon wants Leah to get to safety.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 23''' — Leah is the daughter of Zakareth the Sixth.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Leah uses a scrying lens to observe events.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Leah wears a crystal bracelet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 3''' — Leah is a character who opposed Talos in the succession.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — In Damasca, Leah is known as Heiress Leah.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 5''' — Leah's family holds the throne in Damasca and has no surname.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Simon ran into Leah outside his room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 6''' — Leah lived most of her life outside of Myria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 8''' — Leah is a character who can construct crystals from the same stone as her bracelet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 8''' — Leah possesses a Source in the form of a four-pointed crystal star.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 8''' — Leah's Source is linked to her essence and allows her to summon and empower Lirial devices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 8''' — Leah is the daughter of King Zakareth and Talos's sister.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Leah is an Heiress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Leah wears a long red dress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Leah wears a silvered steel circlet set with a ruby.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 12''' — Leah wears a milky white crystal on her left wrist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Leah is an Heiress and the fourth child of King Zakareth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Leah is second in line for the throne of Damasca.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Leah is an Heiress of the Damascan royal family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Leah is a powerful Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Leah was sent to Myria to connect with her mother's family and learn about common villagers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Leah's mother was from Myria and her aunt is Nurita.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Leah sat on a wooden bench thinking about things she should have said.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — Leah has a position of great authority in Damasca.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Leah is the daughter of Kelia and the Heiress of Damasca.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Leah is a Ragnarus Traveler.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 15''' — Leah accepted the burden of her office and swore to fulfill it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 17''' — Leah is the Successor to the throne.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 19''' — Leah is in charge at the location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Leah has a history in Myria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Leah possesses a crystal bracelet and can tap into her Source.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Leah uses a crystal bracelet to reach into Lirial and summon crystal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Leah is searching for her brother.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Leah arrived at the battle wearing her crown with her Lirial Source nearly tapped out.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Leah is a character who wears a red-and-gold dress and a ruby circlet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Leah watches Simon dash off into the distance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Leah is the person Indirial refers to as 'Doll'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 21''' — Leah commanded the Incarnation of Valinhall to drop his weapons and await execution.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Leah was safe in Enosh at the Grandmasters’ palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Leah is Damascan royalty wearing a crown of Damasca and a silk dress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Leah had been in the village for almost three years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Leah is to be served as Queen by Talos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 22''' — Leah used power against the Incarnation earlier.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 25''' — Leah is the Queen of Damasca.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 25''' — Leah is a Ragnarus Traveler and a Queen of Damasca.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — Leah has called Simon to help with missions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 3''' — Leah has dark hair and blue eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — Leah has a birthright to open the Crimson Vault.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — Leah holds a Traveler's bond with the Crystal Fields of Lirial and Ragnarus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 4''' — Leah is an Overlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 6''' — Leah said she needed Simon's help.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 8''' — Leah can afford the Queen's communications crystal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Leah had to explain her mission's delay to seven Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — Leah wields a tall Lightning Spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 10''' — Leah possesses a scrying lens that is a round crystal mirror.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Leah is a queen.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Leah wears a crown with a ruby.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 11''' — Leah is part of the group taking out Alin's army.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 12''' — Leah possesses a Ragnarus spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Leah's body shakes with pain after using the Lightning Spear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — Alin needs to take care of Leah.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 15''' — Leah possesses a token that can send someone directly into safe lands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 16''' — Leah almost got Alin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Leah is a Queen and an Overlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 17''' — Leah is currently in Avernus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — Leah has ancestors who used the Hanging Trees.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 19''' — Leah has a camp outside of Cana.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 20''' — Leah stepped out of the Avernus Gate with a raven on each shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Leah is the only active Ragnarus Traveler left.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 21''' — Simon is probably with Leah on the hill.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Leah uses floating Lirial crystals to collect reports from Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 22''' — Leah suggests she can follow the King into the House.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 24''' — Leah walked into the Crimson Vault.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Leah's battle plan involves forming lines outside of a Gate and fighting a retreat into Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 25''' — Leah can track the target's destination.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Leah spoke to Alin, stating that they allowed Grandmaster Naraka to come as a peace offering.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Leah has replaced her left eye with a glowing red substitute.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Leah wears a long, expensive dress of pure red and a silver circlet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Leah has a raven on her left shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 26''' — Leah knows the King's real goal is Elysia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Leah is standing behind a wall of golems and Travelers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Leah was at the edge of the Elysian Gate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Leah sealed the Incarnation's legs with a layer of crystal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Leah is facing the Ragnarus Incarnation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Zakareth tells Leah to remember that she should save power for emergencies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 27''' — Leah possesses her father's eye.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
